title: DWD® Parcel Drop Box Large Stylish Grey with White Hatch Door Outdoor Weatherproof Secure Mail Premium Parcel Lockable Postbox H 82 x L 44 x W22 cm Save your time waiting in, Never miss parcels again
features: NEVER MISS A PARCEL AGAIN: We all know how precious our time is and on a nice sunny day there is nothing more frustrating then waiting in for your important parcel well now there is a parcel solution that you can invest in that allows couriers to drop off parcels outside your home when you are not in and to leave them securely so you can retrieve them on your return, Well worth the investment
STYLISH TWO TONE CONTRAST: A modern anthracite grey powder coated finish with a contrasting white hatch panel door to give clear visibility on which door to open to drop off your parcel

ANTI FISHING DESIGN: Couriers simply post your packages into the top compartment the parcel moves to the holding compartment for you to collect on your return. Because of a unique anti-fishing design, the box contents can only be accessed with a key via the lower compartment.

COMPLIMENTS YOUR DECOR GALVANISED POWDER COATED: Manufactured from quality galvanised steel and powder coated in a weather and rust resistant anthracite grey RAL7016 with a White RAL9016 door, the large Premium DWD Parcel Box is designed to withstand British weather whilst blending in with your front garden and matching the tones of your house or business

LOCK: Uniquely designed with your convenience in mind, the large Premium Parcel Box features doors secured with a quality lock and accessible with your unique key.(2 keys provided) This allows you to install the box almost anywhere, with your deliveries always being accessible.

FIXINGS PROVIDED: There are holes pre drilled on the back and floor so depending on the application it can be floor mounted or wall mounted as 4 strong anchor sleeves bolts provided to give you a strong fixture

RECEIVE PARCELS SIZE: Designed to receive multiple deliveries on a daily basis, the large parcel box fit parcels measuring up to 38.5 cm x 30 cm x 11 cm Package Storage Area 38.5 x 20 x 41.5cm 32 Litre
WEATHERPROOF: Designed with the weather in mind, will protect from rain, snow, wind, sun so rest assured your parcels will be safe till you get back
